_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
reference_document_element_description: Develop and maintain operational documentation for data systems, including standard operating procedures, runbooks, escalation matrices, and knowledge base articles.
comments: DCWF ksa intersects with WIDAI OP domain. OP-T-010 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: TF-A-002 (TF, cosine: 0.466), DQ-K-010 (DQ, cosine: 0.447).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 4.5/10 (raw 0.449). Shared vocabulary: [knowledge]. DCWF-only terms [calls, system] vs WIDAI-only terms [articles, base, data, develop, documentation, escalation] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.860 (P=0.885, R=0.836). P exceeds R by 0.049 — the DCWF element's 4 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 19 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the DCWF element.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.8%). "Knowledge of system calls" and "Develop and maintain operational documentation for data systems, including stand" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.507 > STS 0.449 (gap +0.058). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [knowledge] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 4.8%. Shared tokens: [knowledge]. DCWF-only: [calls, system]. WIDAI-only: [articles, base, data, develop, documentation, escalation].
